description: Output of translate_agent. Extends parsed.schema.json — every block gains a 'translated' field.
notes: Schema is identical to parsed.schema.json with one addition:
Each block MUST include a 'translated' field (string, may be empty string on failure).
translate_agent must NOT alter any other block field.

translated.description: Translated text. Empty string if translation failed. MUST preserve \n structure.
